content.seo_title: Scale Your Freelance Dev Workflow: Claude Code Skills Setup
content.seo_description: Stop struggling to scale. Learn how to master Claude Code skills setup to automate your freelance dev projects using Antigravity for elite, repeatable output.
content.answer_block: To scale your freelance business, you must transition from manual coding to AI-orchestrated development. By implementing Claude Code skills setup, you transform your CLI into a force multiplier. Use Antigravity to define architectural constraints, allowing Claude Code to execute complex refactoring and feature implementation autonomously, drastically reducing your ship-to-market time.
content.intro:
The freelance developer’s graveyard is paved with projects that hit a complexity ceiling. You start with high velocity, but as the codebase grows, your manual overhead expands until you're spending more time debugging than building. The feeling of being 'stuck' in a feedback loop of maintenance is the silent killer of your hourly rate.

But there is a way out. By integrating Claude Code into your workflow, you stop being a line-writer and start acting as an architectural director. This isn't just about using AI for snippets; it is about creating a high-fidelity system that maintains code quality at scale, allowing you to handle multiple high-ticket projects without burning out.

steps.title: Establish Architectural Guardrails
steps.description: Before automating, you must define the constraints of your codebase. Use Antigravity to generate a structural blueprint that prevents AI hallucinations.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the existing directory structure and generate a strict 'project_rules.md' file that defines folder hierarchy, naming conventions, and dependency injection patterns for a scalable Node/TS architecture.

steps.title: Configure Claude Code Context Injection
steps.description: Ensure Claude understands your project history by embedding your documentation directly into its runtime environment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an optimized context-summary of all current API endpoints and database schema definitions to be used by an LLM agent for feature expansion.

steps.title: Automate Boilerplate Generation
steps.description: Stop writing repetitive auth and crud patterns. Let the AI build the foundation while you handle the business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a full CRUD boilerplate for a new 'Subscription' module based on the existing User model patterns.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement Subscription module following established architectural patterns'

steps.title: Implement Self-Healing Test Suites
steps.description: Ensure project scalability by having Claude Code write and fix tests whenever new features are introduced.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scan the current feature implementation and write comprehensive Jest unit tests that cover edge cases and error handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Write and execute tests for the new module; fix any failures detected'

steps.title: Continuous Refactoring Loop
steps.description: Maintain code health by instructing Claude Code to perform regular dependency updates and clean-up tasks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Identify technical debt and suggest refactoring patterns to optimize code modularity without changing existing functionality.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Refactor the service layer for better modularity based on the identified technical debt'

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'claude_ignore' file to prevent the agent from processing heavy assets or node_modules, keeping token usage efficient.
Use Antigravity to generate custom 'persona' prompts that force the AI to act like a Senior Staff Engineer rather than a junior dev.
Keep your context files under 10k tokens to ensure Claude maintains high focus during complex cross-file refactoring tasks.
Chain your commands: Use Antigravity to plan the task, then pipe that plan directly into the Claude Code prompt for execution.
Audit the AI's output by requesting a 'diff summary' before committing, ensuring you retain final architectural oversight.
content.next_steps: After completing this setup, begin by migrating one non-critical module of your current project to the Claude Code workflow. Monitor your velocity increase over the next 48 hours and refine your project_rules.md file based on the AI's performance.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting manual labor dictate your growth. Scale your freelance practice by mastering the tools that turn hours into minutes. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
